name: King's Man
overview: The story of King's Man revolved around a Raja Rupendra Pratap Singh who is king of the Dhawal Pur.  Raja Rupendra party is rolling in the Dhwal Pur and every day find a dead body. Watch the complete show to know the  complete conspiracy behind that.

trailers.title: King's Man | Ullu Originals | Official Trailer | Releasing on: 5th April
